name: Agent Sable

aspects.high_concept: The White-Gold Cipher, State Knife That Doesn't Officially Exist
aspects.trouble: Mission Loyalty Limits Mercy (But Deals Are Allowed)
other_aspects: Arrives Before You Notice You're Late

stunts: Oculatus Network: +2 to Create Advantage with Notice when using informants, planted witnesses, or surveillance.
Nonlethal Takedown: +2 to Fight when attacking to inflict a consequence that represents restraint/capture rather than injury.
Authority Without Badges: Use Will instead of Rapport when issuing calm, terrifying instructions to civilians.
notes: This is spy-thriller tier. He can offer a deal that bends the bounty into a story arc.
gm_notes: Use him sparingly. When he shows up, it should feel like the campaign zoomed in.
